Alabama Pharmacy Tech License

Here's what you need to know.

Last updated 2026-02-25 · Sources verified

Endorsement through Alabama Board of Pharmacy
See the steps Primary board page

Fee and timing details are still being re-checked state by state. Check the board page before you count on a fee or timeline for a start date.

Out-of-State Pharmacy Technicians

There is no active interstate compact route for pharmacy technician licensing in Alabama. Plan on endorsement through Alabama Board of Pharmacy.

Key Timeline Factors

Keep these requirements in mind, as they are the most likely to impact your processing timeline in Alabama.

  • Fingerprinting: Required. Out-of-state applicants can use IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects). Completing prints outside Alabama can add 2-4 weeks.
  • License verification: Alabama requires verification of your current out-of-state license before your file is complete.
  • Compact status: No active compact route here. Plan on endorsement.
  • Temporary license: The board lists a temporary or provisional route while the full file is pending.

Alabama Endorsement Requirements

This is the step-by-step endorsement checklist for already-licensed pharmacy technicians applying to practice in Alabama.

  1. Step 1

    Submit Your Application

    Apply through the Alabama Board of Pharmacy. The application fee is $100.

  2. Step 2

    Provide License Verification

    Alabama requires official verification of your active out-of-state license. This must be sent directly to the board from your current state board or its official online verification system before your file can be considered complete.

  3. Step 3

    Request Official Transcripts

    Sent directly from your educational institution.

  4. Step 4

    Submit Your Exam Score Report

    Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

  5. Step 5

    Complete Fingerprinting and Background Screening

    Alabama requires a criminal background check for all applicants. Out-of-state applicants can use IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects). Completing prints outside Alabama can add 2-4 weeks to your processing time.

  6. Step 6

    Await Board Processing

    Plan for a processing timeline of about 4 to 6 Weeks once your file is complete. If you need to start working immediately, the board offers a temporary or provisional licensing route that you can utilize while your full application is pending.

Temporary License

Alabama offers a temporary or provisional license so you can start working while your full endorsement application is processing.

Alabama Pharmacy Technician Licensing FAQ

How much does a Alabama pharmacy technician license cost?

Verify the current fee and processing timeline on the primary board page linked below. Those details are still being re-checked state by state for this specialty.

Is national certification required?

Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

Does Alabama have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?

No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in Alabama. To work in Alabama, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to Alabama?

Verify the current fee and processing timeline on the primary board page linked below. Those details are still being re-checked state by state for this specialty.

Can I start working in Alabama while my endorsement application is processing?

Verify the current fee and processing timeline on the primary board page linked below. Those details are still being re-checked state by state for this specialty.
